sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, updated 2025-02-27): more than 1,500 Paldean Fates booster packs opened, per-tier rates with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 15.89% ±1.69, Ultra Rare 6.61% ±1.15, Shiny Rare 25.44% ±2.01, Shiny Ultra Rare 7.72% ±1.23, Illustration Rare 7.22% ±1.20, Special Illustration Rare 1.72% ±0.60, Hyper Rare 1.61% ±0.58. Paldean Fates is a special Shiny set: two rarities absent from normal SV sets return here — Shiny Rare (120 low-value baby shinies, a hit in ~1 in 4 packs) and Shiny Ultra Rare (12 full-art shiny ex, the real chase). We model them as their own tiers rather than folding them into the ex tiers. Wider confidence intervals than the 8,000-pack sets reflect the smaller n=1,500 sample. No ACE SPEC tier.
